creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
The MASTER_SITES for this port uses MASTER_SITE_BERLIOS
but BERLIOS has been dead for awhile now.
While I haven't cobbled up a patch. It should be trivial for
anyone wishing to do so. All versions, both past, and present
are located here:

http://sourceforge.net/projects/xfstt.berlios/files/

Best wishes.

--Chris
